# Invictus AI Dental Standard Site

## Welcome
Welcome to the Invictus AI Dental Clinic Standard Template. This site is optimized for AI search engines (AEO and GEO).

## Services
1. Root Canal Therapy
2. Teeth Alignment
3. Cosmetic Dentistry
4. Preventive Care
5. Dental Consultation
6. Cavity Detection

## Doctors
- Dr. Rahul Sharma: BDS, MDS (Orthodontics). Specializes in Invisible Braces, Smile Designing, Kids Dentistry.

## About Us
Experience advanced, painless dental treatments at our clinic. We blend modern clinical technology with warm, personalized hospitality. With digital scanners, same-day restorations, and flexible membership plans, we make dentistry convenient and predictable.

## Operating Hours
- Monday - Saturday: 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed
